utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Can you see my nipples through this shirt ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No . But do not worry , I am sure they are still there .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Where are you going , Mr . Suity ... Man ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , I have an appointment to see Dr . Robert Pillman , career counselor a ... gogo . I added the " a ... gogo . "
